title: Smoky Roasted Brazilian Smoked Meat Paella
description: A rich and juicy Brazilian dish featuring smoky paprika, grilled meats, and a halal-friendly twist, all cooked to perfection in a traditional paella pan.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the onion, bell pepper, and garlic, and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the chorizo sausage and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the beef brisket and cook until browned on all sides, then add the shrimp and cook until pink and cooked through.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the paella rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly, until the rice is coated in oil and slightly toasted.
Add 2 cups of water to the pan and bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Stir in the tomato and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the flavors have melded together.
Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve hot.
Let the paella rest for 5 minutes before serving, which will allow the flavors to settle and the rice to absorb any remaining liquid.
Serve immediately and enjoy!
This dish is best served with a side of sliced avocado or a simple green salad.
This smoky roasted Brazilian smoked meat paella is a hearty and flavorful dish that is perfect for a weeknight dinner or a special occasion.
It's a one-pan wonder that's easy to make and feeds a crowd, making it perfect for a party or a potluck.
This recipe is halal-friendly and gluten-free, making it a great option for those with dietary restrictions.
This dish is packed with protein and flavor, making it a great option for athletes or fitness enthusiasts looking for a post-workout meal.
This smoky roasted Brazilian smoked meat paella is a must-try for anyone looking for a unique and delicious twist on traditional paella.
It's a dish that will transport you to the sun-kissed beaches of Brazil and leave you feeling full and satisfied.
This recipe is perfect for a cold winter's night, as the smoky flavors and hearty ingredients will warm your belly and your soul.
This dish is a great option for a special occasion, such as a birthday or anniversary, as it's sure to impress your guests.
This smoky roasted Brazilian smoked meat paella is a dish that will become a staple in your household, as it's easy to make and always a crowd-pleaser.
